title: Argentinian Beef Empanadas
description: A traditional Argentinian dish filled with seasoned beef and gooey cheese, perfect for a hearty dinner or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together ground beef, gooey cheese, festive onion, crumble, salt, and pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and water.
Add the egg mixture to the beef mixture and mix well.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with crumble.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
